lakeStrings.originalSentence: But I’ve made a bargain with the Baron.
lakeStrings.subject: bargain

lakeStrings.subject: general

lakeStrings.subject: choice
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around choice, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: The Harkonnens have my wife, Wanna.
lakeStrings.subject: harkonnens
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around harkonnens, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: They take her apart like a doll.
lakeStrings.subject: apart
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around apart, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.subject: buy
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around buy, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.subject: are
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around are, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.subject: paul
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around paul, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: I will do what I can.
lakeStrings.subject: can
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around can, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: And you will kill a man for me.
lakeStrings.subject: kill
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around kill, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: I’m going to replace your peg tooth.
lakeStrings.subject: going
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around going, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: If you bite down hard, this tooth will crush.
lakeStrings.subject: bite
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around bite, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: Breathe out, and you will fill the air with poison.
lakeStrings.subject: air
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around air, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: It will be your last breath.
lakeStrings.subject: breath
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around breath, with neutral tone.

lakeStrings.originalSentence: But if you choose your moment well, it will also be the Baron’s.
lakeStrings.subject: baron
lakeStrings.understanding: This sentence introduces the thread around baron, with neutral tone.
